description: Style Notecatwalk perfects the spring's aesthetic just right with this simplistically designed pair. This simple heeled pair elevates your casual staples to give them a refined polish. Versatile enough to be worn with ethnic kurtis and denims and tees.Heel: 3"Product DetailsThong style upper in gold with big stone embellishmentBeige, soft footbed with a heel patchGold slim heel with a plastic heel caoSmooth, tough outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
